title: Personal User - download/install, Login with Gmail, not present on any Lens tenant
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app shows paired headset with correct data for a Gmail user not associated with any Lens tenant
steps: 1. Download and install the Poly Studio Mobile app from the app store.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Log in using a Gmail account that is not associated with any Lens tenant.
4. Pair a supported Poly Bluetooth headset with the mobile device.
5. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
6. Verify the paired headset appears on the Home screen.
7. Tap on the paired device name to open Device Settings.
8. Verify the device image is displayed correctly.
9. Verify that all available settings (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) are accessible and display correct data.
10. Navigate to Account settings in the app.
11. Verify that the logged-in account is not registered on any Lens tenant.
expected: The paired headset appears on the Home screen with correct device image and settings. The account is not registered on any Lens tenant.
